announcements.details: Read the commentary on the readings for the Solemnity of the Most Holy Trinity.
announcements.title: Commentary: Trinity Sunday

announcements.details: There will be ONE mass on Sunday, 7th June, 2026. Offertory will be led by the Sunday borns and the Sacred Heart of Jesus Confraternity. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: Solemnity of the Most Holy Body and Blood of Christ

announcements.details: Kindly note that there is In His Presence on Sunday, 31st May at 6pm. Come with your written intentions and articles of faith to be blessed.
announcements.title: In His Presence

announcements.details: The St Bakhita Marriage School will reopen on Sunday, 5th July, 2026. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest
announcements.title: St Bakhita Marriage School

announcements.details: Catechesis for the Sacraments is ongoing. Baptism and First Communion classes for children aged 10 and above are held on Saturdays at 3:00pm. Confirmation classes are for those aged 15 and above, while adult classes take place on Sundays after the first Mass. Interested persons should register with the catechists, at the parish office.
announcements.title: Chatechism Classes

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

masses.subtitle: First Mass at 7:00am, Second Mass at 9:30am
masses.title: Solemnity of the Most Holy Body and Blood of Christ

masses.subtitle: Monday at 7am, Wednesday to Friday at 6am
masses.title: Weekday Morning Mass

sacraments.details: Kindly contact the church office to register for Infant Baptism
sacraments.subtitle: First Saturday of every month, after Grotto Mass
sacraments.title: Infant Baptism

sacraments.subtitle: Adults: Sunday after first mass; Children: Saturdays at 3pm
sacraments.title: Catechism Classes

sacraments.subtitle: The St Bakhita Marriage School will reopen on Sunday, 5th July, 2026.
